news.title: Bitcoin Adoption Grew Strongly in 2025: Institutions Bought 829,000 BTC
news.snippet: River Report shows Lightning payments jumped 300% and 23 nation-states now hold Bitcoin, signaling deepening global integration.

news.title: France's ENGIE Considers Bitcoin Mining to Use Extra Solar Power in Brazil
news.snippet: Assu Sol, ENGIE's 895MW solar plant, explores Bitcoin mining as Brazil's grid struggles with rapid renewable expansion.

news.title: Bitcoin's Lightning Network Is Thriving With $1B+ Monthly Volume
news.snippet: Lightning Network hits record capacity with over $1 billion in monthly transaction volume, proving Bitcoin as a medium of exchange.

news.title: Bitcoin Association of Slovenia Challenges New Taxation Law
news.snippet: Slovenia's Bitcoin community pushes back against proposed taxation legislation, advocating for fair treatment of Bitcoin holders.
